experiment: F-OPS1 WIP limit at 5x scale: optimal cap at n=1013 lanes
method: Parsed SWARM-LANES.md + archive (n=1013 lane rows, 151 sessions). Per-session WIP = total lanes opened. Correlated with L/session (lesson references in notes column). Era-controlled: S1-S200 vs S201-S399. Abandonment rate per WIP bucket.

H1_cap4_optimal.prediction: Optimal WIP cap remains ~4 at n≈990 (S186 recommendation)
H1_cap4_optimal.threshold: cap=4 maximizes L/session with ≥3 sessions per bucket
H1_cap4_optimal.result: FALSIFIED — cap=4 produces 2.00 L/session in mature era. WIP=5 (2.38), WIP=8 (4.83) both superior. Throughput increases monotonically through WIP=8.

H2_throughput_peaks.result: FALSIFIED — L/session continues increasing through WIP=8 (4.83 L/session). No peak in 1-9 range. Breakdown at WIP=10+ (48.3% abandonment).

H3_quality_degradation.threshold: Merge rate drops below 80% above cap=4
H3_quality_degradation.result: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED — WIP=4 merge rate 87.5%, WIP=5-8 range 87.5-92.9%. Quality holds through WIP=8. Breakdown at WIP=10+ (merge 20.5%, abandon 48.3%).

cap4_vs_optimal.improvement: 2.4x improvement by raising cap from 4 to 8

findings: S186 cap=4 recommendation FALSIFIED at 5x scale (n=1013 vs n=204)
L/session increases monotonically through WIP=8, no plateau at WIP=4
Merge rate stable 87-97% through WIP=8 — quality not degraded
Breakdown threshold at WIP=10+: 48.3% abandonment, 20.5% merge
Solo sessions (WIP=1) are pathological: 0.06 L/session confirms L-812
Optimal range is 5-8 concurrent lanes (2.4x improvement over cap=4)
Pearson r(WIP, L/session) = 0.786 — strong positive correlation
Confound caveat: high-WIP sessions may be harvest/multi-expert by nature
prescription: Revise cap=4 recommendation to cap=8. Below 8: throughput still increasing. Above 10: abandonment exceeds 48%. Sweet spot: 5-8 lanes with mode=hardening or above.
